_doc: Synthetic self-test for the Track C pipeline. NOT real user data — hand-authored to exercise the interval logic. It contains: (1) a belief EVOLUTION (c1->c2, sequential timestamps, must be SUPERSEDED not flagged); (2) two true CONTRADICTIONS (c5/c6 asserted concurrently; c7/c8 with overlapping explicit 'always/never' intervals); (3) a same-stance non-conflict (c3/c4); (4) one NOISE claim (n1) the disambiguation gate should have dropped, to exercise BEP. Expected verdict: PASS.
